---
title: "About"
---

# About Daho Wealth

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth is a financial and economic intelligence platform focused on Africa, global markets, and the African diaspora.

We are building tools that make stock market data, macroeconomic indicators, financial education, and investment research easier to access and understand.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 Africa-Focused

We prioritize African markets, African data gaps, and opportunities across emerging economies.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📊 Data-Driven

Our platform combines financial data, economic indicators, dashboards, and analytical tools.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🎯 Education First

We make complex financial concepts easier for students, investors, entrepreneurs, and communities.

</div>

</div>

---

## Mission

<div class="glass-card">

Our mission is to make institutional-grade financial education, stock market analytics, and economic intelligence accessible, transparent, and actionable for Africans, the diaspora, and emerging-market investors worldwide.

</div>
